channel.title: Um Actually
channel.description: Latest releases from Um Actually on Dropout.tv

item.title: The Baby Bracket Volume 3
item.description:
Not-so-super-nerds Ronnie, Carl, and Zeke discuss fantasy names and vie for points from big dawg.

Duration: 29:58

Tags: Um Actually, ify nwadiwe, brian david gilbert, game shows, unscripted, trivia, pop culture, nerds, superfans, internet, one of these things is not like the other, this vs that, how it happened, jumping the shark, ronnie adrian, zeke nicholson, carl tart

item.title: Jordan, Tien, and Jess Have a Touching Moment
item.description:
Couch potatoes Jordan, Tien, and Jess discuss pitfall physics, IP based tv shows, and wild endings.

Duration: 31:48

Tags: Um Actually, ify nwadiwe, brian david gilbert, game shows, unscripted, trivia, pop culture, nerds, superfans, internet, one of these things is not like the other, this vs that, how it happened, jumping the shark, jordan myrick, tien tran, jessica ross, tv shows
